characters.description: A 20-year-old engineering student displaced into the Underground Jungle when the System transforms Earth. Classless and surrounded by much stronger monsters, he takes shelter in a healing refuge and resolves to survive by developing skills and following paths.
characters.name: Randidly Ghosthound

characters.description: An unidentified blue-skinned, three-eyed traveler who reaches the Underground Jungle refuge wounded and uses its pool to recover. He tells Randidly that they are both travelers and identifies the jungle as a level-35 dungeon.
characters.name: Unidentified blue-skinned traveler

characters.description: A blue-skinned, three-eyed traveler recovering from a curse in the Underground Jungle's healing pool. He is a powerful fighter who depends on Randidly for food and offers to guide him to the dungeon entrance once he can leave the refuge.
characters.name: Shal

characters.description: A hostile teenager who claims the abandoned cabin where Randidly has begun establishing a base.
characters.name: Hostile teenager

characters.description: A hostile teenager who claims Randidly's abandoned cabin before becoming its practical caretaker. Donny accepts instruction about skills, paths, and classes, works with the other young survivors at the growing base, and presents himself under the chosen name Dusk.
characters.name: Donny

characters.description: One of Donny's young associates at the cabin settlement. Chubbs reports useful intelligence about a large goblin force and helps the small group establish itself under Randidly's guidance. His information gives Randidly a lead toward the resource needed to found a village.
characters.name: Chubbs

characters.description: The cabin survivor previously known as Chubbs. By the time his name is established, Daniel serves as the new village's Quartermaster and studies how its spirit, soul points, buildings, shops, and class system function. His administrative insight complements Donny's combat leadership.
characters.name: Daniel

characters.description: An older, axe-wielding survivor who represents a group concealed in a pickup truck during a goblin attack. Randidly rescues the group, gives him a health potion, and answers his question about classes.
characters.name: Older axe-wielding survivor

characters.description: The older, axe-wielding leader of a pickup-truck group and one of Randidly's first practical allies on Earth. Before introducing himself as Sam, he joins the survivors gathering near Randidly's cabin and asks Randidly for advice about paths.
characters.name: Sam

characters.description: A thin, red-haired newcomer who joins Donny’s followers as the settlement attracts more survivors.
characters.name: Decklan

characters.description: An imposing survivor who arrives with the settlement's expanding population. His Brute class provides strength-focused growth.
characters.name: Dozer

characters.description: A class-derived healer who supports Donnyton during its first devastating large horde. Ptolemy uses Healing Palm while the settlement's defenders struggle with exhaustion, poor coordination, and breached defenses, giving the young village an essential source of battlefield recovery.
characters.name: Ptolemy

characters.description: The spirit attached to the newly founded village. Nul offers classes, makes the first class-holder chieftain, and warns that local protection will end after seven days.
characters.name: Nul

characters.description: A small, concealed member of Sam’s traveling party who has learned the Monobolt skill.
characters.name: Hooded young girl

characters.description: A young traveler in Sam’s group who shapes mana into small, delicate constructs, including a winged figure.
characters.name: Lyra

characters.description: Sam's taller traveling companion, introduced at the settlement alongside Lyra.
characters.name: Elaine

characters.description: The crowned mayor of a neighboring fortified town who styles himself a king. At the barricade, he demonstrates class-backed authority that can compel another person to kneel.
characters.name: Constance

characters.description: A Weather Witch associated with Donnyton who demonstrates magic that freezes an opponent’s feet in place.
characters.name: Clarissa

characters.description: Dozer's partner and an exceptionally capable archer who insists on joining Donnyton's wall defense. Her precision skills make her a natural answer to airborne attackers, even though Dozer would prefer to keep her away from the battle.
characters.name: Annie

characters.description: An intelligent level-30 Sphinx waiting beyond the safe boundary. Ep-Tal identifies itself as a village tribulation, a destructive trial that arrives when protection ends. Its speed, teleportation, strength, and fire immediately place it beyond Randidly's usual opponents.
characters.name: Ep-Tal

characters.description: An unnamed male scout who investigates the villages near Donnyton on behalf of a group of about sixty Frankfurd survivors. After a fortified settlement turns him away, he approaches Donnyton as an advance contact.
characters.name: Unnamed Frankfurd scout

characters.description: A police officer from the fortified settlement near Donnyton. Craig travels with Elaine while bringing glass jars to Donnyton.
characters.name: Craig

characters.description: A member of the Frankfurd survivor group associated with its generators and earlier potion experiments.
characters.name: Regina

characters.description: A member of the Frankfurd survivor group associated with its generators and earlier potion experiments.
characters.name: Alana

characters.description: Donny's first successful protege through the mentor system and, apart from Donny, the highest-level knight. Devin is selected to join the caravan traveling south toward Frankfurd.
characters.name: Devin

characters.description: A principal member of Donnyton's day-to-day council. Her control of the settlement's supplies gives her substantial influence over its affairs.
characters.name: Mrs. Hamilton

characters.description: A patron Randidly selects while advancing along the Apprentice path. Its test and demands are not yet known when he makes the choice.
characters.name: Patron of Ash

characters.description: Randidly's former girlfriend from Rollins University, now living in Frankfurd. Their reunion proves that university survivors reached the city. Tessa introduces him to its work-and-token system while he conceals his real strength and searches for his missing friends.
characters.name: Tessa

characters.description: A Frankfurd patrol leader encountered when Randidly enters the city by a separate route from Donnyton's delegation. Alex represents the local security structure that Randidly intends to avoid while concealing his strength and searching quietly among Rollins survivors.
characters.name: Alex

characters.description: A supervisor in Frankfurd's garment operation who quickly notices Randidly's unusual aptitude for sewing. Cassie rewards his work with concert access and becomes a useful local contact while he quietly asks workers for information about people displaced from Rollins University.
characters.name: Cassie

characters.description: An intelligent raid boss forced into Randidly's world by an unknown figure. Although the local barrier suppresses its level, it retains dangerous abilities and plans to feed and reproduce.
characters.name: Black Tusk Wolf Raid Boss

characters.description: A Donnyton scout whose Sovereign of Ghosts class provides powerful spiritual abilities. His ghost servants can gather intelligence, and his class also includes the distinctive Soulbind Monster ability.
characters.name: Glendal

characters.description: Nathan's eight-year-old twin and one of Donnyton's youngest residents. Randidly entrusts a mature soul seed to the children before leaving for Frankfurd, giving Kirstie an immediate connection to the strange plant life that grows from his skills.
characters.name: Kirstie

characters.description: Kirstie’s eight-year-old twin and one of the two children trusted with Randidly’s second mature soul seed before he leaves Donnyton.
characters.name: Nathan

characters.description: A soot-black tree grown from Randidly's second soul seed under the care of Nathan and Kirstie. It begins by imitating the twins' dancing, showing responsive behavior before its purpose or abilities are understood.
characters.name: Soot-black tree

characters.description: Arbor is the name used for the responsive tree produced by Randidly's second soul seed. It mirrors the dancing of Nathan and Kirstie.
characters.name: Arbor

characters.description: A Frankfurd singer whose concert Randidly attends with Tessa.
characters.name: Raina

characters.description: A Killer who studies under Decklan and serves in his squad that hunts raid bosses.
characters.name: Ivan

characters.description: A Juggler-class combatant in Decklan’s raid-boss hunting squad who specializes in magic-driven speed.
characters.name: Terra

characters.description: Raina's armed guard, who remains wary of Randidly during his meeting with the singer.
characters.name: Matilda

characters.description: The thorn-covered growth that sprouts from Randidly's matured soul seed inside Ep-Tal. It follows his intent during the fight and helps restrain the Sphinx's severed tongue after it enters his body, revealing the seed as a responsive living ally.
characters.name: Randidly's soul plant

characters.description: The name Randidly gives his first soul plant after surviving the battle with Ep-Tal. Thorn is mobile, thorn-covered, nourished by blood, and capable of independent attacks while remaining responsive to Randidly's mental direction.
characters.name: Thorn

characters.description: One of Randidly’s missing friends. After returning to Earth, Randidly makes finding Ace a central goal alongside locating Sidney and his parents.
characters.name: Ace

characters.description: One of Randidly’s missing friends. After returning to Earth, Randidly resolves to search for Sidney along with Ace and his parents.
characters.name: Sidney

characters.description: An acquaintance of Donny who joins the young survivors at Randidly’s cabin. She learns about skills, paths, and classes as the site becomes an informal base.
characters.name: Tara

characters.description: A famous action actor traveling with Sam’s group. Cal asks Randidly to escort him and several companions to the neighboring fortified town.
characters.name: Cal Drake

characters.description: An actress revealed as the previously cloaked member of Sam's traveling group during Randidly's escort mission. She is admitted to the neighboring fortified town with Cal and Elaine.
characters.name: Vivian Plath
